semanticNodes.text: A stack operates on a LIFO principle where the last element is the first out. A queue uses FIFO.
Stack is LIFO. Therefore the most recent item added is the first to be removed. Queue is strictly FIFO.
The LIFO model dictates stack behavior (like plates). Queue is FIFO (like a line).
Stack is LIFO, I'm not sure about Queue.
A stack is LIFO. It takes O(1) time. Queue is something else.
Stack uses the LIFO method to add data.
Stack LIFO use karta hai, aur Queue FIFO use karta hai.
Stack LIFO ke principle par chalta hai. Queue FIFO par.
